tasks.subject: Task 1: HabitSection — visual polish & alignment fix
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Fix streak-badge alignment so all 7-cell columns stay on the same axis, increase cell size to 16×16, update arrow to link to the habit's detail page.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/habits/HabitSection.tsx`
- Modify: `src/components/habits/HabitSection.test.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Heatmap cells are `w-4 h-4` (16px) with `rounded`
- [ ] Streak badge is inside a `w-9 text-right` fixed-width slot placed left of the cells
- [ ] Today's cell has `ring-2 ring-purple-200` highlight
- [ ] Arrow `›` links to `/habits/${habit.id}` (not `/habits`)
- [ ] Header label uses `text-purple-600`
- [ ] All existing HabitSection tests pass; new test verifies arrow href

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/components/habits/HabitSection.test.tsx`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/habits/HabitSection.tsx", "src/components/habits/HabitSection.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/components/habits/HabitSection.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Cells w-4 h-4 rounded", "Streak in w-9 fixed slot", "Today ring-2 ring-purple-200", "Arrow links to /habits/[id]", "All tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: HabitCard — accordion redesign
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Collapsed header shows [streak-slot 36px][7-cell mini heatmap][▼]; expanded shows 30-day heatmap + three stat pills; habit name links to detail page.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/habits/HabitCard.tsx`
- Modify: `src/components/habits/HabitCard.test.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Collapsed: 7 cells mini heatmap, streak in 36px fixed slot
- [ ] Expanded: 30-day heatmap + stat pills (completion%, streak, mood emoji)
- [ ] Habit name is a Link to `/habits/[id]`
- [ ] Expand/collapse on chevron button only
- [ ] All tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/components/habits/HabitCard.test.tsx`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/habits/HabitCard.tsx", "src/components/habits/HabitCard.test.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/components/habits/HabitCard.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["7-cell mini heatmap in collapsed", "30-day heatmap in expanded", "Stat pills data-testid present", "Name links to /habits/[id]"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: /habits page — summary bar
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add summary bar above the habit list showing total active habits, 7-day avg completion rate, and best current streak. Sort habits by completion rate descending.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/hooks/useAllHabitLogs.ts`
- Modify: `src/app/habits/page.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `useAllHabitLogs(ids)` returns per-habit logs using `useQueries`
- [ ] Summary bar shows three pills: active count, 7-day %, best streak
- [ ] Loading state shows `—` in pills
- [ ] Habits sorted by completion rate descending
- [ ] Full test suite passes (no regressions)

**Verify:** `npx vitest run`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/hooks/useAllHabitLogs.ts", "src/app/habits/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["useAllHabitLogs uses useQueries", "Summary bar has 3 pills", "Habits sorted by completionRate desc", "No test regressions"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: /habits/[id] — detail page with calendar & reflections
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create detail page with stat pills, monthly calendar with navigation, and reflections list; clicking a calendar date scrolls to that day's reflection.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/components/habits/HabitDetailCalendar.tsx`
- Create: `src/components/habits/HabitDetailCalendar.test.tsx`
- Create: `src/app/habits/[id]/page.tsx`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Calendar renders correct month grid (Mon–Sun)
- [ ] Done cells purple, missed grey, today has ring, reflection dot amber
- [ ] ‹ disabled at 90-day boundary, › disabled at current month
- [ ] Click done+reflection cell scrolls + highlights that reflection entry
- [ ] Reflections list filters to visible calendar month
- [ ] onMonthChange prop syncs reflections list to calendar month
- [ ] Invalid habit id shows error state
- [ ] All calendar tests pass

**Verify:** `npx vitest run src/components/habits/HabitDetailCalendar.test.tsx`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/components/habits/HabitDetailCalendar.tsx", "src/components/habits/HabitDetailCalendar.test.tsx", "src/app/habits/[id]/page.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx vitest run src/components/habits/HabitDetailCalendar.test.tsx", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Month grid Mon-Sun", "Done/missed/today/reflection-dot states", "Prev disabled at 90-day limit, next at current month", "Click scrolls to reflection", "Reflections filter by calendar month"]}
```
